title: Investment and Exit Plans — Ethical Web AI
description: Ethical Web AI's value is in its patents and defensible IP. Our exit strategy and the path to get there.

blocks.text: Ethical Web AI's strength and value are in its patents and defensible IP

blocks.html: This makes the company more like a Pharma startup rather than a tech startup. Our most likely exit will be being acquired by one of the biggest AI companies or one of the technology giants.

blocks.text: We have routes and ways to get in front of the right people at the right time

blocks.html: We will start this process in the next six months once we are ready. It requires us to achieve three things:

items.text: Raise sufficient funds to be fully capitalised (approximately $6m)
Have the share price more closely represent the actual value of the business
Achieve some sales of AI Vault to grow revenue
